sections.paragraph:
Original: ארח

Transliteration: 'ârach

Phonetic: aw-rakh'

BDB Definition:

  1. to wander, journey, go, keep company with
    1. (Qal)
      1. to journey, go
      2. (participle)
        1. wandering, wayfarer, journeying
      3. (substantive)
        1. wanderer, wayfarer, traveller

Origin: a primitive root

TWOT entry: 161

Part(s) of speech: Verb
